docs.title: Welcome to VOÏA Documentation
docs.text:
Transform Customer Feedback into Business Intelligence

AI-Powered Voice of Customer Platform

docs.title: What is VOÏA?
docs.text: VOÏA (Voice of Client) is a customer feedback platform that helps you understand what your customers really think. Using AI technology, VOÏA transforms survey responses into clear, actionable insights that help you improve your business.

docs.title: Key Benefits
docs.text:
AI-Powered Smart Analysis Automatically analyze customer feedback to identify trends, sentiment, and opportunities.

Easy to Use Simple Campaign Creation Create and send surveys to your customers in minutes, not hours.

Conversational Natural Language Surveys Let customers respond in their own words through AI-powered conversations.

Actionable Insights Executive Reports Get clear, visual reports that show exactly what matters to your business.

docs.title: 1. Create Your First Campaign
docs.text:
A campaign is a survey you send to your customers. Here's how to get started:

  1. Click Campaigns in the sidebar
  2. Click Create Campaign
  3. Choose a name (e.g., "Q1 2025 Customer Feedback")
  4. Set start and end dates
  5. Customize your survey questions

Time needed: 5-10 minutes

docs.title: 2. Add Participants
docs.text:
Participants are the customers who will receive your survey:

  1. Navigate to Participants
  2. Add individually or upload a CSV file
  3. Include name, email, and any additional details

Time needed: 5 minutes (or instant with CSV import)

docs.title: 3. Send Invitations
docs.text:
Once your campaign is ready, send invitations to your participants:

  1. Open your campaign
  2. Click Activate Campaign
  3. Invitations send automatically on your start date

Automatic reminders: VOÏA sends reminder emails automatically to boost response rates.

docs.title: 4. Review Your Results
docs.text:
Watch responses come in and analyze the results:

  1. Go to your Dashboard
  2. View real-time metrics (NPS score, sentiment, key themes)
  3. Download executive reports

Updates: Your dashboard updates in real-time as responses arrive.

docs.title: 📊 Dashboard Analytics
docs.text:
See your customer feedback at a glance with NPS scores, sentiment analysis, and key themes.

Learn more about Dashboard →

docs.title: 🤖 AI Conversational Surveys
docs.text:
Let AI conduct natural conversations with your customers instead of rigid question forms.

Learn more about Conversational Surveys →

docs.title: 👥 Participant Management
docs.text:
Organize and segment your customer base for targeted feedback collection.

Learn more about Participants →

docs.title: 📧 Email Campaigns
docs.text:
Automated invitation and reminder emails to maximize response rates.

Learn more about Email Campaigns →

docs.title: User Roles
docs.text:
Admin Full access to create campaigns, manage users, and configure settings.

Manager Create and manage campaigns, add participants, view analytics.

Viewer View dashboards and reports only (cannot create or edit).

docs.title: License Tiers
docs.text:
Your account has specific limits based on your license:

  • Campaigns per year
  • Maximum participants per campaign
  • Number of users

View License Details →

docs.title: Need Support?
docs.text:
• In-app Help: Look for icons throughout the platform
  • Email Support: Contact your account administrator
  • Documentation: Browse this guide for detailed instructions

docs.title: Video Tutorials Coming Soon
docs.text: Step-by-step video walkthroughs of key features will be available soon.

docs.title: Next Steps
docs.text:
📚 Explore All Features

Learn about every capability of the VOÏA platform

View Feature Guide → 🎫 Understand Licenses

Learn about license types and usage limits

View License Guide →

Welcome to VOÏA - Let's turn customer feedback into business growth.

docs.title: VOÏA Platform Features
docs.text: This guide covers all features available in the VOÏA platform.

docs.title: Conversational Survey Engine
docs.text:
Instead of traditional forms, VOÏA can conduct natural conversations with your customers using AI.

How it works: - Customers respond in their own words - AI asks smart follow-up questions - Conversation feels natural and engaging - Data is automatically structured for analysis

Benefits: - Higher completion rates (customers prefer conversations) - Richer feedback (more detailed responses) - Less survey fatigue - Automatic language detection

Powered by: OpenAI GPT-4o (state-of-the-art AI)

docs.title: Automatic Analysis
docs.text:
VOÏA analyzes every response automatically:

Sentiment Analysis Detects if feedback is positive, negative, or neutral

Key Themes Identifies the main topics customers mention (e.g., "pricing," "support quality," "features")

Churn Risk Flags customers who might stop using your service

Growth Opportunities Highlights areas where customers want improvements

No manual work required - All analysis happens automatically in the background.

docs.title: Executive Reports
docs.text:
Get professional PDF reports with: - Overall NPS score and trend - Sentiment breakdown - Top customer themes - Risk and opportunity highlights - Response statistics

Perfect for: Sharing with leadership or stakeholders

docs.title: Campaign Lifecycle
docs.text:
Every campaign follows a simple workflow:

Draft → Create and configure your survey Ready → Review before launching Active → Survey is live, collecting responses Completed → Campaign closed, final reports available

docs.title: Creating a Campaign
docs.text:
Step 1: Basic Information - Campaign name - Start date (when invitations send) - End date (last day to respond) - Description (internal notes)

Step 2: Survey Type - Traditional Survey: Fixed questions - Conversational Survey: AI-powered conversations

Step 3: Customization - Customize questions - Set completion time estimate - Add your branding

Step 4: Participant Assignment - Choose who receives the survey - Import from CSV or add manually

docs.title: Automated Reminders
docs.text:
VOÏA automatically sends reminder emails to boost response rates:

Midpoint Reminder Sent halfway through your campaign (e.g., Day 45 of a 90-day campaign)

Last Chance Reminder Sent 7-14 days before campaign closes (you choose)

Automatic and smart - No manual work needed.

docs.title: Participant Database
docs.text:
Centralized database of all your customers: - Name and email - Company (optional) - Role/position (optional) - Custom fields

Advanced filtering: Find participants by company, role, or custom attributes

docs.title: Adding Participants
docs.text:
Option 1: Manual Entry 1. Click Add Participant 2. Enter name, email, and optional details 3. Save

Option 2: Bulk CSV Import (Recommended for large lists) 1. Download CSV template 2. Fill in participant data 3. Upload file 4. VOÏA validates and imports automatically

Validation: VOÏA checks for duplicate emails and invalid data

docs.title: Participant Segmentation
docs.text:
Group participants by: - Company: Track feedback by organization - Role: Senior executives vs. frontline users - Tenure: Long-term vs. new customers

Use segmentation for: - Targeted campaigns - Segmented analytics - Personalized survey experiences

docs.title: Dashboard Overview
docs.text:
Your main dashboard shows: - NPS Score: Net Promoter Score (-100 to +100) - Response Rate: Percentage of participants who responded - Sentiment Distribution: Positive, neutral, negative breakdown - Active Campaigns: Currently running surveys - Recent Responses: Latest feedback received

Real-time updates: Dashboard refreshes automatically

docs.title: Net Promoter Score (NPS)
docs.text:
NPS measures customer loyalty on a scale from -100 to +100.

How it's calculated: - Promoters (9-10): Happy customers who recommend you - Passives (7-8): Satisfied but not enthusiastic - Detractors (0-6): Unhappy customers at risk of leaving

NPS = % Promoters - % Detractors

Industry benchmarks: - Excellent: 50+ - Good: 30-50 - Average: 10-30 - Needs improvement: Below 10

docs.title: Sentiment Analysis
docs.text:
Every response is analyzed for emotion: - Positive: Customer is happy - Neutral: Factual feedback, no strong emotion - Negative: Customer is frustrated or disappointed

Visual trends: See sentiment change over time

docs.title: Key Themes
docs.text:
VOÏA automatically extracts the main topics from feedback: - Product quality - Customer support - Pricing - Features - Onboarding experience

See what matters most to your customers without reading every response manually.

docs.title: Account Intelligence
docs.text:
For each customer, VOÏA assesses:

Churn Risk Customers who might leave based on negative sentiment or low NPS

Growth Opportunity Customers who are engaged and might expand their usage

Use this data to: - Prioritize at-risk accounts - Identify upsell opportunities - Allocate customer success resources

docs.title: Email Configuration
docs.text:
Choose how VOÏA sends emails:

Option 1: VOÏA-Managed (Default) We handle email delivery using our servers. No configuration needed.

Option 2: Your Own SMTP Server Use your company's email server for branded emails.

Requirements for custom SMTP: - SMTP server address - Port number - Username and password - Connection security (TLS/SSL)

Test before activating: VOÏA includes a built-in connection tester

docs.title: Email Templates
docs.text:
All emails are professionally designed and include: - Your company logo - Campaign name - Personalized greeting - Survey link - Professional footer

Automatic branding: Your logo appears in all emails automatically

docs.title: Invitation Management
docs.text:
Bulk Invitations Send to all participants at once when campaign activates

Individual Invitations Send to specific participants manually

Resend Options Resend to participants who haven't responded

Delivery Tracking See which emails were delivered, opened, or bounced

docs.title: User Roles
docs.text:
Admin - Create and manage campaigns - Add and remove users - Configure branding and email settings - View all analytics

Manager - Create and manage campaigns - Add participants - View analytics - Cannot manage users or settings

Viewer - View dashboards and reports only - Cannot create campaigns or modify data

docs.title: Adding Team Members
docs.text:
1. Navigate to User Management
  2. Click Add User
  3. Enter email address
  4. Select role (Admin, Manager, or Viewer)
  5. Send invitation

Email invitation: New user receives login instructions automatically

docs.title: License Limits
docs.text:
Your account has a limit on users based on your license: - Core: 5 users - Plus: 10 users - Pro: 25+ users (customizable)

Check usage: User management page shows "X of Y users"

docs.title: Logo Upload
docs.text:
Add your company logo to surveys and emails:

  1. Go to Brand Configuration
  2. Click Upload Logo
  3. Select image file (PNG, JPG, or SVG)
  4. Logo appears automatically across platform

Best practices: - Use transparent background (PNG) - Recommended size: 200x60 pixels - Maximum file size: 2MB

docs.title: White-Label Options
docs.text:
Custom Domain (Enterprise plans) Use your own domain (e.g., feedback.yourcompany.com)

Branded Surveys Surveys match your company colors and style

Email Branding Emails sent from your domain

[Contact support for white-label setup]

docs.title: Secure Survey Access
docs.text:
Participants access surveys using unique, secure tokens: - One-time use: Token expires after use - Time-limited: Optional expiration dates - No login required: Participants don't need accounts

Security: Tokens are cryptographically secure and cannot be guessed

docs.title: Data Privacy
docs.text:
Anonymization Options Hide participant names in reports (show anonymous responses only)

Data Encryption All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest

Access Control Only authorized users in your account can see your data

Multi-tenant Isolation Your data is completely separated from other VOÏA accounts

docs.title: Audit Logging
docs.text:
VOÏA tracks all important actions: - Campaign creation and activation - User logins - Participant additions - Email sends - Report exports

Use audit logs for: - Compliance - Security monitoring - Team accountability

docs.title: Understanding Your License
docs.text:
Your VOÏA account includes specific limits based on your license tier:

  • Campaigns per year
  • Maximum users
  • Participants per campaign
  • Features included

Check your limits: Navigate to License Overview in settings

Learn more about licenses →

docs.title: Mobile-Responsive Design
docs.text:
VOÏA works on all devices: - Desktop: Full feature access - Tablet: Optimized layout - Mobile: Surveys and dashboards work perfectly on phones

Participants can respond from any device

docs.title: Accessibility Features
docs.text:
VOÏA follows web accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA): - Screen reader compatible - Keyboard navigation support - High contrast mode - Clear labels and instructions

Inclusive feedback collection for all customers

docs.title: Export Options
docs.text:
Export your data in multiple formats: - CSV: Spreadsheet format for analysis - PDF: Executive reports - Excel: Formatted workbooks with charts

What you can export: - Participant lists - Survey responses - Analytics reports - NPS trends

docs.title: API Access (Plus and Pro plans)
docs.text:
Integrate VOÏA with other systems: - CRM integration - Business intelligence tools - Custom reporting systems - Automated workflows

[API documentation available for technical teams]

docs.title: System Performance
docs.text:
VOÏA is built for speed: - Dashboard loads in under 500ms - Supports 1,000+ concurrent survey participants - Handles 10,000+ responses per hour

99.9% uptime with automatic failover

docs.title: Background Processing
docs.text:
Long-running tasks happen in the background: - AI analysis of responses - Bulk email sending - Executive report generation

You don't have to wait - Continue working while VOÏA processes data

docs.title: Help Resources
docs.text:
In-Platform Help Look for icons next to features

This Documentation Comprehensive guides and instructions

Video Tutorials Coming Soon Step-by-step video walkthroughs

docs.title: Contact Support
docs.text:
Reach out to your account administrator or contact: - Email: support@voia.com - In-App Chat (if enabled)

Need help? Don't hesitate to reach out to our support team.

docs.title: VOÏA License Guide
docs.text: Understanding your account limits and license options.

docs.title: What is a License?
docs.text:
Your VOÏA license determines: - How many campaigns you can run per year - Maximum number of participants per campaign - How many team members can use the platform - Which features are available - Support level

Check your current license: Navigate to Settings → License Overview

docs.title: Core License
docs.text:
Best for: Small teams starting with customer feedback

Limits: - 4 campaigns per year - 5 users maximum - 200 participants per campaign - 12-month duration

Features included: - ✓ Traditional and conversational surveys - ✓ Basic analytics and NPS tracking - ✓ Email delivery - ✓ Standard support - ✓ Basic templates

Pricing: Contact sales for pricing

docs.title: Plus License Popular
docs.text:
Best for: Growing businesses with regular feedback needs

Limits: - 4 campaigns per year - 10 users maximum - 2,000 participants per campaign - 12-month duration

Features included: - ✓ Everything in Core - ✓ Advanced analytics and segmentation - ✓ Priority email support - ✓ Custom survey templates - ✓ API access - ✓ Executive PDF reports

Pricing: Contact sales for pricing

docs.title: Pro License
docs.text:
Best for: Enterprises with high-volume feedback programs

Limits (Customizable): - 12+ campaigns per year (customizable) - 25+ users maximum (customizable) - 10,000+ participants per campaign (customizable) - 12+ month duration (customizable)

Features included: - ✓ Everything in Plus - ✓ Custom analytics dashboards - ✓ Dedicated account manager - ✓ White-label branding - ✓ Custom integrations - ✓ SLA guarantee (99.9% uptime) - ✓ Advanced API access - ✓ Priority support (24/7)

Pricing: Custom pricing based on your needs

docs.title: Trial License
docs.text:
Best for: Evaluating VOÏA before committing

Limits: - 1 campaign - 2 users maximum - 50 participants per campaign - 1-month duration

Features included: - ✓ Basic platform features - ✓ Limited support - ✓ Sample survey templates

Pricing: Free trial

docs.title: Annual License Cycle
docs.text:
Licenses operate on an annual anniversary basis:

Example: - License starts: January 15, 2025 - License renews: January 15, 2026 - Campaign limit resets: January 15, 2026

Important: Campaign limits reset on your anniversary date, not January 1st

docs.title: License Expiration
docs.text:
30 days before expiration: You'll receive renewal reminders

Upon expiration: - You can still view existing data - Cannot create new campaigns - Cannot activate existing draft campaigns - Users cannot be added

Renewal: Contact your account administrator or VOÏA sales

docs.title: How to Check Usage
docs.text:
Navigate to Settings → License Overview to see: - Campaigns used this year (e.g., "3 of 4") - Current user count (e.g., "7 of 10") - Days remaining in license period - License expiration date

Color indicators: - Green: Plenty of capacity remaining - Yellow: Approaching limit (80%+) - Red: At or over limit

docs.title: What Counts as "Usage"
docs.text:
Campaigns: - Draft campaigns: Don't count - Active campaigns: Count toward limit - Completed campaigns: Count toward limit (for that year)

Users: - Active users: Count toward limit - Deactivated users: Don't count - Invited (not yet accepted): Count toward limit

Participants: - Counted per campaign (not total across all campaigns) - Adding 300 participants to one campaign uses 300 of your per-campaign limit

docs.title: When to Upgrade
docs.text:
You might need to upgrade if: - You hit your campaign limit mid-year - You need more users - You want advanced features (API access, white-label) - You need larger campaigns (more participants)

Upgrade process: 1. Contact your account administrator 2. They contact VOÏA sales 3. Upgrade is processed within 24-48 hours 4. New limits apply immediately

docs.title: Downgrading
docs.text:
Downgrades typically happen at renewal: - Cannot downgrade mid-cycle (except in special cases) - Existing campaigns continue running - New campaigns follow new limits

Important: If downgrading reduces user limit below current user count, you'll need to deactivate users first

docs.title: Campaign Limit Reached
docs.text:
What happens: - You cannot activate new campaigns - Draft campaigns stay in draft mode - Active campaigns continue normally

Solutions: - Wait for annual renewal - Upgrade license - Delete draft campaigns (if not needed)

docs.title: User Limit Reached
docs.text:
What happens: - Cannot invite new users - Existing users continue working normally

Solutions: - Deactivate inactive users - Upgrade license - Wait for annual renewal

docs.title: Participant Limit Exceeded
docs.text:
What happens per campaign: - Cannot add more participants to that campaign - Other campaigns unaffected

Solutions: - Create a second campaign (if you have campaign quota) - Reduce participant list - Upgrade to higher participant limit

docs.title: Demo Accounts
docs.text:
Used for: VOÏA demonstrations and trials

Limits: - Very limited (1 campaign, 50 participants) - Short duration - Not for production use

To convert demo to full license: Contact VOÏA sales

docs.title: Custom Enterprise Licenses
docs.text:
For: Large organizations with unique needs

Can include: - Custom campaign limits (50+/year) - Custom user limits (100+) - Unlimited participants - Multi-year agreements - Volume discounts - Custom integrations

Contact VOÏA sales for custom licensing

docs.title: Can I exceed my campaign limit temporarily?
docs.text: No, the system enforces limits strictly. Contact sales for emergency upgrades.

docs.title: What happens to my data if my license expires?
docs.text: Your data is preserved for 90 days after expiration. You can still log in and view data (read-only). Renew within 90 days to avoid data loss.

docs.title: Can I transfer campaigns from one license year to the next?
docs.text: No, campaigns are tied to the license year they were created in. A new year means fresh campaign quota.

docs.title: How do I know when I'm approaching my limits?
docs.text: VOÏA displays warnings when you reach 80% of any limit (campaigns, users, or participants).

docs.title: Can I buy additional campaigns mid-year?
docs.text: Yes, contact sales for campaign add-on packages. Pricing varies based on your current license.

docs.title: What if I deactivate a campaign - does it free up my quota?
docs.text: No, once a campaign is activated, it counts toward your annual limit even if you later close it.

docs.title: Do trial users count toward my user limit?
docs.text: Yes, anyone with access to your VOÏA account counts as a user.

docs.title: License Comparison Table
docs.text: Feature Core Plus Pro Trial Campaigns/year 4 4 12+ (custom) 1 Users 5 10 25+ (custom) 2 Participants/campaign 200 2,000 10,000+ (custom) 50 Duration 12 months 12 months 12+ months (custom) 1 month Conversational surveys ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ NPS tracking ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Email delivery ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Basic analytics ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Advanced analytics ✗ ✓ ✓ ✗ API access ✗ ✓ ✓ ✗ Custom templates ✗ ✓ ✓ ✗ PDF reports ✗ ✓ ✓ ✗ White-label ✗ ✗ ✓ ✗ Custom integrations ✗ ✗ ✓ ✗ Dedicated support ✗ ✗ ✓ ✗ SLA guarantee ✗ ✗ ✓ ✗

docs.title: Contact Options
docs.text:
Account Administrator Your company's VOÏA admin can check your license status

VOÏA Sales For upgrades, renewals, or custom licensing Email: sales@voia.com

VOÏA Support For technical questions about licenses Email: support@voia.com

Questions about licensing? Contact your account administrator or VOÏA sales team.
